title: 1C Things We Love — Идиомы: хобби и интересы

items.example: When they offered me a trip to Japan, I jumped at the chance.
I'm not really into football, so I'll give the match a miss.

items.idiom: run a mile at the thought of
items.example: I'd run a mile at the thought of having to give a public speech.
You wouldn't catch me dead at a karaoke bar.
I'd give my right arm for a chance to see my favourite band live.
No way would I ever go bungee jumping — it's too dangerous.
You wouldn't catch me doing anything that involves heights.
